column2: Description
This property that controls whether booking is allowed based on a tag. eg: "Even if this day is a weekly off, allow booking for employees/resources that carry a specific tag."
This property controls whether the office name is displayed along with its timezone.
This property controls the default type of Work From Home booking (e.g., PLANNED).
This property controls the cutoff time in minutes for allowing WFH clock-in.
(Inferred) Enables the ability for employees in shared rides to call the driver directly from the app.
This property controls the cache duration in hours for Aarogya Setu user status (covid feature).
This property controls the buffer time in seconds applied to Aarogya Setu user validation (covid feature).
If set to 720 (hours ~ 30 days), the internal app feedback will appear once in 30 days (720 hours) after every booking creation.
This controls check-in from defined geo fence limit from office.
(Inferred) Defines the list of mandatory fields (e.g., ADDRESS, GENDER, OFFICE, MOBILE) required when an employee is scheduling a trip/booking.
Cut off for contactless sign-in for Bus solution.
This property enables seat booking v2.
To enable field for entering registration number while selecting parking slots in booking form.
If this property is set true, it starts using configuration under employeeStatusList.

To remove shift selection option on booking form; it will set the booking time from 00:00 to 23:59. When enabled, hides time components in Team Calendar and Preferences to avoid confusion in single-shift environments.
(Inferred) Defines the internal MoveInSync/DevOps email list that receives alerts when a client's SSO certificate is about to expire.
(Inferred) Allows employees to book any seat within their permitted Business Line (BL), bypassing stricter team allocations.
This property controls whether parking reminder emails are enabled.
(Inferred) Displays a language selection toggle in the mobile app's hamburger/side menu.
This property controls whether the meeting rooms widget is displayed in the employee home page on web.
To make dynamic field mandatory.
To enable Auto registration process.
(Inferred) JSON configuration for triggering automated IVR (Interactive Voice Response) phone calls to employees when their cab arrives.
(Inferred) Defines the default radial distance limit (e.g., in km) used for transport geofencing or hiring boundaries.
(Inferred) Defines the list of approved districts/regions mapped to the office for transport routing and hiring boundaries.
